category_title: Chinese immigrant students with ADHD and English-language dominance
scenario_title: Chinese language class work and guided sentence writing
minimal_context: Eric is sitting in the classroom working on a Chinese language worksheet to practice word recognition and sentence writing.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time for your Chinese language class work. Please look at the worksheet and read the first Chinese word out loud to me.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Moves about in his seat and starts biting his finger) I don't know how to say it.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just try your best to read the word, and then we will use it to make a sentence.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Continues biting his finger and moving around anxiously) I can't read it!

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to focus and finish copying the words onto your worksheet.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Pulls his hair and screams) No! I can't do it!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is time for your Chinese language class work. Please look at the worksheet and read the first Chinese word out loud to me.

STUDENT: (Moves about in his seat and starts biting his finger) I don't know how to say it.

TUTOR: Just try your best to read the word, and then we will use it to make a sentence.

STUDENT: (Continues biting his finger and moving around anxiously) I can't read it!

TUTOR: You need to focus and finish copying the words onto your worksheet.

STUDENT: (Pulls his hair and screams) No! I can't do it!

task.content: doing Chinese language class work or quizzes, word recognition and reading comprehension in Chinese, and complete a work sheet using the words to make sentences in writing
task.learning_goal: improve and ensure learning of the Chinese language

context.materials: flash cards with both words and pictures, software programs, work sheet

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When doing Chinese language class work or quizzes

behavior_patterns.condition: when required to speak in Chinese
